sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100073" key="sunenergh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνενεργ-ής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n100073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">active at the same time</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4018.tlg001:286:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">286.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
